description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tox that runs on push and pull request to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs: lint and build. The lint job should run on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of linters (checkdoc and mypy) using a docker container with snakepacker/python:all image. The build job should also run on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of tox environments (py35, py36, py37, py38, and their uvloop variants) and a rabbitmq service, using the same docker container and running tox with specific environment variables.
